title: ilex cinerea
intro: Ilex cinerea, also known as the Grey Holly, is a type of flowering evergreen shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex cinerea include reducing fever, relieving headaches and colds, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Ilex cinerea include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and berries in hot water or a solvent.
